name: Mandarin Hot & Sour Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Cornstarch dissolved in 3 tablespoons water
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring soup stock to a boil.
2. Add shredded pork, black mushrooms, and wood ears (if using). Cook for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and seasonings (except cornstarch, eggs, and green onion). Reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes.
4. Thicken the soup with cornstarch mixture and turn off heat.
5. Slowly pour in beaten eggs in a thin stream while stirring.
6. Serve immediately. Garnish with chopped green onion.
7. If preparing the soup ahead of time, do not add cornstarch and eggs until serving time to prevent overcooking the eggs and maintaining the appearance. Adjust the hotness using varying amounts of white pepper and the sourness using different amounts of vinegar.
